---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
toc: true
toc-title: "Contents"
---

::: {style="margin-bottom:0.3rem;"}
[CV français (PDF)](CV/CV_JLG.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::: {style="margin-bottom:1.5rem;"}
[CV English (PDF)](CV/CV_JLG_ang.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::

---

## Current Position

**Professor of Economics** (since 2022)
CESAER — Centre d'Économie et Sociologie Appliquées aux Espaces Ruraux
Institut Agro Dijon, Department of Human and Social Sciences
26 Boulevard Petitjean, 21079 Dijon Cedex, France

---

## Education

| Year | Degree | Institution |
|------|--------|-------------|
| 2006 | Agrégation de l'Enseignement Supérieur en Sciences Économiques | National competitive examination (France) |
| 2002 | PhD in Economic Analysis and Policy *(mention: honors)* | Université de Bourgogne |

**PhD thesis:** *Disparités géographiques et convergence entre régions européennes : approche d'économétrie spatiale*

---

## Academic Positions

| Period | Position | Institution |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| 2022 – present | Professor | Institut Agro Dijon |
| 2015 – 2021 | Professor | AgroSup Dijon |
| 2008 – 2015 | Professor | Université de Franche-Comté, Dept. of Law, Politics, Economics & Management |
| 2006 – 2008 | Professor | IUT de Belfort-Montbéliard, Université de Franche-Comté |
| 2003 – 2006 | Associate Professor *(Maître de conférences)* | Université Montesquieu-Bordeaux |
| 2002 – 2003 | Visiting Researcher | Regional Economics Applications Laboratory (REAL), University of Illinois |
| 1998 – 2002 | Teaching Assistant | Département Économie et Gestion, Université de Bourgogne |

---

## Awards & Distinctions

| Year | Award |
|------|-------|
| 2025 | **Musgrave Prize** — Best article, *National Tax Journal* |
| 2014 | Excellence in Reviewing — *Geographical Analysis* |
| 2010 | Elected Fellow, Spatial Econometrics Association |
| 2006 | Best Referee — *Regional Studies* |
| 2005 & 2004 | Second Prize EPAINOS — European Regional Science Association |
| 2003 | Prix Philippe Aydalot & Prix Vouters (PhD dissertations) |

---

## Editorial Responsibilities

### Editor / Co-editor

| Journal | Role | Period |
|---------|------|--------|
| [*Journal of Regional Science*](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/14679787) | Co-editor | 2026 – present |
| [*Journal of Geographical Systems*](https://link.springer.com/journal/10109) | Editor-in-Chief | 2025 – present |
| [*Frontiers in Sustainable Cities — Urban Economics*](https://www.frontiersin.org/journals/sustainable-cities/sections/urban-economics) | Associate Editor | 2024 – present |
| [*Papers in Regional Science*](https://rsaiconnect.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/14355957) | Co-editor | 2019 – 2024 |
| [*Spatial Economic Analysis*](https://www.tandfonline.com/loi/rsea20) | Co-editor | 2007 – 2021 |
| [*Revue d'Economie Régionale et Urbaine*](http://www.reru.fr/) | Co-editor | 2010 – 2015 |

### Editorial Board Member

| Journal | Period |
|---------|--------|
| [*Journal of Regional Science*](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/14679787) | 2024 – present |
| [*Econometrics*](https://www.mdpi.com/journal/econometrics) | 2024 – present |
| [*Journal of the Korean Planning Association*](https://www.kpa1959.or.kr/) | 2023 – present |
| [*Revue Economique*](https://reveco.hypotheses.org/a-propos) | 2019 – present |
| [*Investigaciones Regionales*](https://investigacionesregionales.org/) | 2019 – present |
| [*International Journal of Urban Sciences*](https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/rjus20) | 2016 – present |
| [*Regional Studies, Regional Science*](https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/rsrs20) | 2015 – present |
| [*Economics and Business Letters*](https://reunido.uniovi.es/index.php/EBL) | 2014 – present |
| [*International Regional Science Review*](https://journals.sagepub.com/home/irx) | 2010 – present |
| [*Review of Regional Studies*](https://rrs.scholasticahq.com/) | 2007 – present |
| [*Letters in Spatial and Resource Sciences*](https://link.springer.com/journal/12076) | 2007 – present |
| [*Journal of Geographical Systems*](https://link.springer.com/journal/10109) | 2019 – 2024 |
| [*Journal of Spatial Econometrics*](https://link.springer.com/journal/43071) | 2019 – 2023 |
| [*Geopolitics under Globalization*](https://www.businessperspectives.org/index.php/journals/geopolitics-under-globalization-2) | 2016 – 2019 |
| [*Papers in Regional Science*](https://rsaiconnect.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/14355957) | 2009 – 2015 |
| *ISRN Economics* | 2013 – 2014 |
